brand_profile.writing_instruction: One idea per sentence. Lead with the outcome, not the mechanism. No jargon. No superlatives. The reader skims — the first line must earn the second. Avoid: game-changer, seamless, powerful, revolutionize.

brand_identity.writing_instruction: One idea per sentence. Lead with the outcome, not the mechanism. No jargon. No superlatives. The reader skims — the first line must earn the second. Avoid: game-changer, seamless, powerful, revolutionize.

product_knowledge.tagline: Visibility & Analytics from AI Search — and the actions to drive growth
product_knowledge.description: Searchable is an AI search optimization platform that helps brands track visibility and analytics across AI engines like ChatGPT and Claude, driving growth through actionable insights. It provides comprehensive tracking, optimization tools, and actionable insights to improve AI search rankings. The platform offers features such as AI visibility tracking, content optimization, technical audits, and competitive analysis to help brands capture millions of clicks from customers discovering products through AI-powered search engines. Searchable also provides real-time alerts, analytics dashboards, and expert support to help brands optimize their AI search presence.

features.name: AI Visibility Tracking
features.description: Monitor brand mentions and rankings across ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Google AI, Copilot, and more

features.name: Content Optimization
features.description: AI-powered content creation and optimization tools to improve AEO score

features.name: Technical Audits
features.description: Comprehensive site analysis to identify and fix issues affecting AI engine understanding

features.name: Competitive Analysis
features.description: Track share of voice compared to competitors across AI engines

features.name: Real-time Alerts
features.description: Get notified when brand is mentioned or rankings change

features.name: Analytics Dashboard
features.description: Detailed insights into traffic, citations, and performance metrics

benefits: Increase product discovery through AI shopping assistants
Enhance visibility when prospects research solutions via AI
Ensure content is cited and linked by AI engines
Get recommended by AI for local searches

proof_points.text: Generated over £1 million in qualified pipeline from AI search
Jonathan Kvarfordt, VP of GTM Strategy & Marketing

pain_points: Difficulty in tracking AI search visibility
Limited understanding of AI search optimization
Inability to improve AI search rankings
Lack of actionable insights to drive growth
Inefficient use of time and resources in analyzing AI visibility gaps
messaging_angles: Optimize for the future of search

platform_rules_summary: Hook must be standalone in first 180 characters
3-5 hashtags at end only, never inline
Short paragraphs with blank line between each
content_brief.benchmark_reference: Industry benchmarks for data-analytics products on LinkedIn
content_brief.reasoning: With 6 distinct features and 5 pain points, a carousel is the best content type to showcase the product's capabilities and address the target audience's concerns. The minimal brand tone supports a straightforward, educational approach. The presence of 3 proof points, strong stats, and customer names provides ample evidence to build a compelling narrative. Given the product's complexity and the brand's substance (6+ features, 3+ proof points), a long-form content approach is suitable, but on LinkedIn, this will be adapted into a concise, step-by-step carousel format.

strategy_brief.lead_pain_point: Inability to track and improve AI search visibility and rankings, resulting in missed growth opportunities
strategy_brief.primary_claim: Searchable helps brands track AI search visibility and drive growth
strategy_brief.differentiator: unlike traditional SEO tools that focus on traditional search engines, Searchable is specifically designed for AI search optimization
strategy_brief.hook_direction: Start by highlighting the consequences of not optimizing for AI search

linkedin_content.hook: You're missing out on sales because your brand isn't visible where customers are searching.
linkedin_content.body: This lack of visibility limits your growth potential. In today's digital landscape, AI search is a key channel. Invisible brands are often left behind by their competitors. Customers can't find you if you're not optimized for AI search. This results in a loss of revenue. Most brands struggle to track their AI search visibility. Manually checking AI engines is time-consuming and ineffective. Manual tracking wastes hours each week. These hours could be spent on growth initiatives instead. Your team's time is valuable. Gartner found that most B2B buyers consult AI engines before contacting a vendor. Most brands have no idea how they appear in these results. This lack of insight is costly. Low visibility on AI search means missed opportunities. Your competitors are taking advantage of this gap. Searchable helps brands track AI search visibility and drive growth. With Searchable, you can optimize your AI search rankings. Our users have seen 206% share of voice improvements.
linkedin_content.full_post:
You're missing out on sales because your brand isn't visible where customers are searching.

This lack of visibility limits your growth potential. In today's digital landscape, AI search is a key channel. Invisible brands are often left behind by their competitors. Customers can't find you if you're not optimized for AI search. This results in a loss of revenue. Most brands struggle to track their AI search visibility. Manually checking AI engines is time-consuming and ineffective. Manual tracking wastes hours each week. These hours could be spent on growth initiatives instead. Your team's time is valuable. Gartner found that most B2B buyers consult AI engines before contacting a vendor. Most brands have no idea how they appear in these results. This lack of insight is costly. Low visibility on AI search means missed opportunities. Your competitors are taking advantage of this gap. Searchable helps brands track AI search visibility and drive growth. With Searchable, you can optimize your AI search rankings. Our users have seen 206% share of voice improvements.

#AISearch #Searchable #GrowthStrategy

evaluation.scores_rationale: The copy is easy to understand, and the mechanism of how Searchable helps brands is self-explanatory, but some sentences are a bit long and could be broken up for easier reading. The hook is strong and creates a sense of urgency, but it could be more specific about the daily friction or consequence of not being visible in AI search results. The copy executes the writing instruction perfectly, leading with the outcome, avoiding jargon and superlatives, and using simple language. The claim about Searchable's effectiveness is directly supported by the proof point of 206% share of voice improvements, which is presented as a specific and verifiable result.
